caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, discussing political developments and speculations for the year 2024. The headline at the top reads "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?" which translates to "Will there be a game with JDU in 2024?" The screen displays a tweet by Akhilesh Yadav, dated January 28, 2024, with over 400K views. The tweet discusses the political landscape, mentioning the BJP's defeat in the Lok Sabha elections and the people's response to it. The lower third of the screen shows additional text, "शपथग्रहण के बाद BJP अध्यक्ष जे. पी. नड्डा का बयान," indicating that this is a statement by BJP President J.P. Nadda after an oath-taking ceremony. The video also features images of various political figures, including Deputy CM Samrat Choudhary, Minister Santosh Suman, and others, suggesting their involvement or relevance to the discussed topic. The timestamp on the screen indicates that the segment was aired at 10:05 PM.
